recommendations.title: Lee
recommendations.overview: The true story of photographer Elizabeth "Lee" Miller, a fashion model who became an acclaimed war correspondent for Vogue magazine during World War II.

recommendations.title: Bait
recommendations.overview: A freak tsunami traps shoppers at a coastal Australian supermarket inside the building ... along with a 12-foot great white shark.

recommendations.title: Sir
recommendations.overview: A prosperous young Indian man falls in love with his servant, a widow with the dream of becoming a fashion designer.

recommendations.title: Barbie: A Fashion Fairytale
recommendations.overview: Barbie, a popular actress on a sabbatical, learns that her fashion designer aunt Millicent has sold her business to a rival. With the help of a few magical beings, Barbie steps in to save the day.

recommendations.title: Love.com
recommendations.overview: It's a love story between a fashion blogger and a video game blogger. The beauty and the nerd.
